name: Cogsworth & Craftwhisper — Tinkers, Inventors, Repairs
description: A converted barn at the end of Mill Road, half-hidden behind a fence that has been rebuilt four times. The sign reads 'Cogsworth & Craftwhisper — Tinkers, Inventors, Repairs' in careful lettering (Ferb's work) with 'NO JOB TOO AMBITIOUS' painted below it in excited scrawl (Phineas's addition). The ground floor is a functioning workshop: forges, lathes, workbenches covered in half-finished mechanisms. The loft is stuffed with blueprints, failed prototypes, and a hammock. Outside, a fenced yard contains whatever the current project is — last month it was a mechanical scarecrow that actually worked. The month before, a water-powered grain sorter that flooded Mill Road. The neighbors have opinions.

sounds: Steady rhythmic hammering from Ferb's station
Phineas talking rapidly to himself or to Ferb
The hiss of hot metal in the quench bucket
A prototype making an unexpected noise
The creak of the loft floorboards under stacked blueprints
smells: Hot iron and coal from the forge
Pine sawdust from the woodworking bench
Burnt insulation from something that overheated
Tea — Ferb brews a pot every two hours like clockwork
atmosphere.lighting: Bright during the day — the barn doors are thrown wide open. At night, an array of oil lamps and one of Phineas's experimental glowing orbs (which flickers unpredictably).

layout.name: Main Workshop Floor
layout.description: Open-plan work area with two primary stations. Ferb's side is immaculate — tools in exact positions, projects organized by stage. Phineas's side is a hurricane of inspiration — blueprints tacked to every surface, three projects in progress simultaneously.

layout.name: The Forge
layout.description: A proper smithing forge built by Ferb's father. Smaller than Torval's at the Millhaven Forge, but better suited to precision work — hinges, gears, clockwork components.

layout.name: The Loft
layout.description: Accessed by a ladder that Phineas keeps threatening to replace with a mechanical lift. Storage for blueprints, completed designs, and rejected prototypes. A hammock hangs in the corner for when Phineas works through the night.

layout.name: The Yard
layout.description: A fenced outdoor area where larger projects take shape. Currently features a partially assembled something that neither Phineas nor Ferb will explain to passersby. The fence has been replaced four times due to 'incidents.'

hooks: Phineas is convinced he can build a device to predict weather three days in advance — he just needs a rare crystal from the Darkwood
Ferb has been quietly building something in the cellar he has never shown Phineas
Heinz Vexworth keeps showing up to 'prove his Inator is better' and the competitive demonstrations are escalating
The town council has sent three warnings about noise and one about an unexplained tremor
A merchant offered Phineas a fortune to relocate to the capital — Ferb hasn't said a word about it

worldContext.location: Cogsworth & Craftwhisper workshop, Mill Road (east end), Millhaven
